National Triglyceride Alliance forms with support from key pharmaceutical companies and medical associations to educate on high triglycerides. #HealthcareInitiative #TriglycerideManagement
news.summary: In an exciting development, the National Triglyceride Alliance (NTA) was officially launched on March 28, 2025, with support from Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals, Amarin Corp, and Alliance Partners alongside leading medical associations. This significant event represents a crucial advancement in the effort to combat high triglyceride levels.

news.headline: Hikvision faces challenges in AIoT amid US sanctions and competition, with shrinking contracts and growing rivals.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Hikvision at a Crossroads: Navigating AIoT Transformation Amid External Pressures" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Hikvision, a prominent security surveillance provider globally, is encountering various challenges. Externally, U.S. sanctions are limiting its international growth. Internally, the company is facing reduced government contracts and rising competition from smartphone manufacturers and major technology companies. This situation poses a pivotal moment for Hikvision as it navigates through these issues.

news.headline: Purple Biotech to present 3 posters at 2025 AACR Meeting: 1 for CM24 in pancreatic cancer, 2 for NT219 in colorectal/head and neck cancers.
news.summary: Purple Biotech Ltd., a company listed on NASDAQ/TASE as PPBT, operating in Rehovot, Israel, shared plans to showcase upcoming poster presentations at the 2025 American Association for Cancer Research Meeting in Chicago from April 25th to April 30th. The presentations will cover the potential of CM24 in treating pancreatic cancer, as well as NT219 for colorectal and head and neck cancers. These therapies aim to combat tumor immune evasion and drug resistance. This event highlights Purple Biotech's focus on innovative treatments for high-need cancer types, underscoring their commitment to advancing cancer research and care.

Oil price set for third weekly increase as Trump's tariffs loom, source says.

UAE anticipates launching digital dirham in Q4 2025, aiming to boost financial stability and combat financial crime.
news.summary: The United Arab Emirates is set to launch its digital dirham central bank digital currency in the fourth quarter of 2025. This move is expected to enhance financial stability and combat financial crime. The digital dirham will be accepted in all payment channels and aims to promote the development of innovative digital products and services. In June 2024, the CBUAE approved a licensing framework for regulating stablecoins, leading to the launch of dirham-backed stablecoins by various companies. The Dubai Financial Services Authority recognized Circle's USDC and EURC stablecoins under its crypto token regime, and Ripple is also working to meet the country's stablecoin requirements. The digital dirham received a rebrand with a new symbol, inspired by the UAE flag.

news.headline: Wall Street forecasters adjust Omeros price expectations before Q4 earnings. Analysts predict a loss of 78 cents/share. Omeros shares rose 4.7% to $8.92.
news.summary: Omeros Corporation (NASDAQ:OMER) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on March 31 post stock market closure. Analysts predict a quarterly loss of 78 cents per share for the Seattle-based company, contrasting with a loss of 69 cents per share a year ago as per Benzinga Pro data. On March 21, Omeros issued an update on its Zaltenibart Phase 3 PNH clinical trial program. The company's shares increased by 4.7% to reach $8.92 by the end of trading on Thursday. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Richmond Fed President Tom Barkin says inflation expectations are loosened, not de-anchored. Economist Craig Shapiro accuses Federal Reserve of gaslighting the public.
news.summary: Economist Craig Shapiro criticized the Federal Reserve, accusing them of deceiving the public, after Tom Barkin, President of the Federal Reserve Bank of Richmond, stated that inflation is not completely uncontrolled. Barkin acknowledged during a press interaction that the US economy has experienced a significant period of inflation. He explained that inflation expectations have diminished, but not completely detached, for both businesses and consumers. In response, Shapiro, a macro strategist at the Bear Traps Report, accused the Federal Reserve of attempting to mislead the public by introducing new terminology to suggest that inflation expectations are still under control. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

Report highlights trends in SiC and GaN tech for automotive electrification, 3rd-gen semiconductors key in advancing EVs and charging infrastructure.
news.summary: The report "Development Trends of Third-Generation Semiconductors in Automotive and Charging Applications" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. These third-generation semiconductors are crucial for the progress of automotive electrification, smart vehicle technologies, and the enhancement of charging infrastructure due to their excellent material characteristics, including high-frequency operation and low power usage. They are increasingly important for the modernization of automotive industry and charging infrastructure.

news.headline: Dynacor Group to pay C$0.01333 dividend per share on April 17, 2025, 61st dividend payment.
news.summary: Montreal-based company Dynacor Group Inc. (TSX: DNG) has disclosed its monthly dividend payment for April 2025, set at C$0.01333 per common share. Shareholders of record as of April 10, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 17, 2025. This marks the 61st dividend and the 51st monthly dividend payment issued by the Corporation. The dividend is classified as an eligible dividend.

news.headline: LAVA reports Q4 2024 results: $76.6M cash balance, 30% workforce reduction, and $5M milestone from J&J. Strategic evaluation ongoing.
news.summary: LAVA Therapeutics N.V. adopted a restructuring plan to extend capital resources, resulting in a 30% reduction in workforce. They have a cash balance of $76.6 million as of Dec 31, 2024, expected to fund operations into 2027. In the Phase 1 trial of LAVA-1266 for AML and MDS, enrollment is progressing. They achieved a development milestone of $5.0 million from Johnson & Johnson in Q4 2024 and received $5.0 million in revenue from contracts with customers in the same quarter. Additionally, they received a clinical development milestone of $7 million from Pfizer in Q1 2024. Research and development expenses were $8.6 million in Q4 2024, mainly due to discontinuation of LAVA-1207, while general and administrative expenses reduced due to lower share-based compensation. Net loss was $3.8 million in Q4 2024, with a total net loss of $25.1 million for the year.

news.headline: Korea Zinc's AGM on March 28, 2025 showed current management maintaining board control with strong shareholder support.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Seoul, South Korea, Korea Zinc (KRX:010130) revealed the results of its annual general meeting (AGM), confirming that the existing management has maintained control of the board amidst challenges from competitors MBK and Young Poong. The study also showed a statistically significant clinical response in 78% of PL8177-treated patients, in contrast to 33% in the placebo group (p<0.005). The symptomatic...

Humacyte's Q4 and 2024 year-end financial results revealed; FDA approved Symvess™ for vascular trauma treatment.
news.summary: Symvess™, an acellular tissue-engineered vessel-tyod, has recently been approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for the treatment of extremity vascular trauma. This approval marks a significant advancement in medical technology, providing a new treatment option for patients with this type of injury. The approval process involved rigorous testing and evaluation to ensure the safety and efficacy of Symvess™. This new treatment option has the potential to benefit a substantial number of individuals who suffer from extremity vascular trauma, offering hope for improved outcomes and quality of life.

This move signifies a shift in the company's leadership structure, with Hand taking on a key position in driving strategic decisions. Edelman's promotion reflects his success in his previous role and showcases the company's commitment to internal talent development. The changes are expected to bring fresh perspectives to the organization and drive growth.

Aave partners with Chainlink SVR to increase revenue by recapturing liquidation MEV. Major move in DeFi.
news.summary: SVR has successfully recovered a significant amount of previously leaked MEV from blockchains, amounting to a historical sum. This reclaimed liquidity has now been redirected back to DeFi applications, aiding in the generation of fresh revenue streams. The accomplishment was made public in San Francisco on March 28, 2025. The collaboration involved Chainlink, a renowned platform for onchain finance, and BGD Labs, an initiative within the Web3 sector with a strong emphasis on Aave. This initiative marks a significant milestone in the utilization of blockchain technology for financial purposes.

news.headline: India aims to diversify lithium imports with stake in SQM's Australian projects. A 20% stake worth $600 million sought by Indian consortium led by KABIL to cater to growing market.
news.summary: India is making a bid to acquire a stake in Chilean mining giant SQM's (NYSE: SQM) ventures in Australia in a move to gain access to essential battery minerals as its demand for lithium grows. Reports from undisclosed sources revealed that an Indian consortium, spearheaded by Khanij Bidesh India Ltd (KABIL), is eyeing stakes in SQM's Mount Holland and Andover lithium projects in Western Australia. The consortium is considering a 20% stake in these projects, valued at approximately $600 million. This marks India's most significant effort to secure overseas lithium supplies, with negotiations ongoing and companies showing interest through initial offers. India's interest in SQM's projects signifies its pursuit to boost its lithium reserves to cater to its burgeoning market for electric vehicles.

news.headline: Halal cosmetics market to reach US$135.54 billion by 2033, growing at a compound annual rate of 12.95% from 2025-2033.
news.summary: An analysis report titled "Halal Cosmetics Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's available reports. The Halal Cosmetics market is projected to increase significantly, reaching a value of US$ 135.54 billion by 2033. This is a notable growth from the market's value of US$ 45.30 billion in 2024, representing a compound annual growth rate of 12.95% expected between 2025 and 2033. The surge in market value is attributed to rising consumer demand, increased awareness of ethical standards, and a continuously expanding market.

(NYSE: PERF), a prominent provider of augmented reality and artificial intelligence solutions for consumers, beauty, and fashion sectors, has submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. news.headline: Karan Brar, Sophie Reynolds, and Mediaplanet work to raise awareness for the millions affected by epilepsy.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that millions of individuals around the globe are affected by epilepsy, a condition characterized by unpredictable seizures that can significantly disrupt daily routines, interpersonal connections, and work opportunities. Regrettably, epilepsy stands as one of the prevalent neurological disorders, magnifying the challenges faced by a substantial number of people in managing their health and well-being.

news.headline: Rise of InfoStealer malware poses a threat to digital finance; over 2 million bank card details leaked last year. User vigilance is crucial to prevent attacks like these.
news.summary: Jimmy Su, Binance's chief security officer, warns about the increasing threat of InfoStealer malware, which is designed to extract sensitive data from devices without the user's knowledge. Kaspersky reported over 2 million leaked bank card details due to InfoStealers in the last year. Malware-as-a-service allows cybercriminals to easily access these tools. Binance has seen a rise in users affected by InfoStealer infections recently. These malware are distributed through phishing emails, fake downloads, malicious browser extensions, and compromised websites. Signs of infection include unusual browser notifications, unauthorized logins, and system slowdowns. Various InfoStealer malware variants are targeting Windows and macOS users, such as RedLine, LummaC2, Vidar, and AsyncRAT for Windows, and Atomic Stealer, Poseidon, and Banshee for macOS. Binance advises users to use antivirus tools, enable two-factor authentication, avoid saving passwords in browsers, and keep devices updated to protect against InfoStealers. The article emphasizes the importance of user education and cyber hygiene to prevent cyber threats.

news.headline: SC bill suggests making Bitcoin part of state reserve with up to 10% of public funds. Rep. Pace leads the proposal.
news.summary: State Representative Jordan Pace has suggested allocating a portion of specific public funds, potentially up to 10%, towards digital assets such as Bitcoin. This proposal aims to diversify the investment portfolio of the state and could involve a significant amount of money being transferred into the digital asset sector. Pace's idea may lead to a substantial increase in Bitcoin holdings within the state's assets, potentially resulting in a notable impact on the overall financial strategy and risk exposure of the funds involved.

news.headline: Lithium Americas reports 2024 full year results, files Form 10-K for year ended Dec 31, 2024. Update on Thacker Pass project. CEO statement.
news.summary: Lithium Americas Corp. disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K, featuring the audited consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: LAC) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: LAC), also delivered news regarding its Thacker Pass lithium project located in Humboldt County, Nevada. Jonathan Evans, serving as President and Chief Executive Officer, expressed the updates.
